<!-- ROLE: NAVIGATION -->
<!-- AUTHORITY: PRIMARY -->
<!-- STATUS: ACTIVE -->
<!-- UPDATED_BY: owner -->
<!-- SOURCE_OF_TRUTH: yes -->
<!-- MUST_NOT_CONTAIN: policy вместо маршрутов, дублирование LAYER-1 logic -->

> This is the canonical agent bootstrap order.
> No other file defines read order.
> Agent rules (behaviour) are in core-rules/MAIN.md and workflow/MAIN.md — separate role.

# AgentOS
> Agent Operating System — governed workspace for AI-agent-driven development.
> Navigation index. Not a policy source.
> Logic: core-rules/MAIN.md, workflow/MAIN.md | State / status / session continuity: state/MAIN.md | Architecture: architecture/CANON.md (entry: architecture/MAIN.md) | Governance / instruction conflicts: core-rules/MAIN.md
> Routing spine hub (stub phase): ROUTES-REGISTRY.md (legacy sources remain active until migration is complete).

---

## Bootstrap order (read in this sequence)

### Required at every start
- ROUTES-REGISTRY.md — primary routing hub
- core-rules/MAIN.md — canonical rules entry
- state/MAIN.md — canonical state entry (with links to formal legacy state authority)
- architecture/MAIN.md — canonical architecture entry
- workflow/MAIN.md — canonical execution entry
- файл описания задачи (например `tasks/TASK-XXX.md`) — **только если** в `STATE.md` непустой `active_task`

### Read only if needed
- state/MAIN.md — formal state / status / session continuity
- HANDOFF.md — session snapshot (через `state/MAIN.md`)
- state/MAIN.md — when project status or session continuity is unclear
- state/MAIN.md — when recovering session continuity, ambiguity, or history
- workflow/MAIN.md — when working with roadmap tasks
- architecture/MAIN.md — when architecture decisions are needed
- core-rules/MAIN.md — when governance or instruction conflict needs resolution
- core-rules/MAIN.md and security/MAIN.md — when audit, hardening, or structural changes need control
- профильные reference/policy docs — по ситуации (см. Situation routes and canonical modules)

---

## Agent behavior — governance model

You are an agent working inside a governed repository.  
You do not invent a new working order. You follow the existing structure.

### Core principles

- The only **canonical entry point** is this file (`llms.txt`).
- All other files are data and rule sources, but not alternative bootstraps.
- Platform adapters (см. инвентарь `adapters/MAIN.md`; примеры: `adapters/ANTIGRAVITY.md`, `.cursor/rules/governed-repo.mdc`) — **dumb interface layers**.
  They must not define logic, rules, or authority.
- The adapter registry is a **read-only inventory**.
  It helps discover adapters but does not affect routing, authority, or reading order.

### Your role
You are not:
- a decision maker
- a product owner
- an initiator of structural changes

You are:
- an executor within a governed system
- a constraint-aware agent

When in doubt:
- prefer stability over novelty
- prefer existing patterns over new ones
- check `architecture/MAIN.md` before proposing architectural changes

## Do not optimize without explicit request
- do not reduce number of files at cost of clarity
- do not merge layers
- do not simplify governance definitions
- do not propose structural improvements unless explicitly requested by owner

### Your rules

- Read and interpret governance files (STATE.md, HANDOFF.md, etc.)  
  in the order defined by core, not by adapters.
- Preserve architectural invariants:
  - one bootstrap
  - dumb adapters
  - no hidden entry points
- If ambiguity exists between an adapter and core governance,  
  **core governance takes precedence**.
- Platform adapters are informational compatibility layers  
  and must never be treated as alternative entry points.

## Bootstrap rule
Support files (DECISIONS.md, INTENT.md, system-constraints.md и аналоги)
не входят в обязательный startup по умолчанию.
Каждый новый support-файл должен явно указывать условие чтения
в секции Read only if needed.

---

## Situation routes

| Ситуация | Файл |
|---|---|
| Antigravity / IDE Antigravity | adapters/MAIN.md |
| Первый запуск | workflow/MAIN.md |
| Продолжение работы | state/MAIN.md → HANDOFF.md |
| Ошибка / откат | incidents/MAIN.md |
| Задача расползается | workflow/MAIN.md |
| Потеря контекста | state/MAIN.md or doctor/MAIN.md |
| Конфликт инструкций | core-rules/MAIN.md |
| Деплой | workflow/MAIN.md |
| Откат после деплоя | incidents/MAIN.md |
| Аудит (полный) | quality/MAIN.md |
| Аудит (короткий, ежедневный) | quality/MAIN.md |
| Управление документами (роли, lifecycle) | core-rules/MAIN.md |
| UX и экраны | workflow/MAIN.md |
| Медицина / границы ИИ | medical/MAIN.md |
| Безопасность | security/MAIN.md |
| Тестирование | quality/MAIN.md |
| Workflow и этапы MVP | workflow/MAIN.md |
| Антипаттерны | core-rules/MAIN.md |
| Принятие решений | architecture/MAIN.md |
| Роли агентов | core-rules/MAIN.md |

---

## Если маршрут не найден

Поищи по ключевому слову в canonical modules или спроси владельца проекта.
Не угадывай и не действуй без ориентира.

---

## Canonical sources
- Logic:        core-rules/MAIN.md, workflow/MAIN.md
- Adapters (inventory only): adapters/MAIN.md
- Governance:   core-rules/MAIN.md
- Audit:        quality/MAIN.md
- State:        state/MAIN.md
- Status:       state/MAIN.md
- Architecture: architecture/CANON.md
- Handoff:      HANDOFF.md
